concept_hook: A teenage prodigy hacker who fights with agile martial arts and deploys drone swarms and holographic distractions,Viewing combat as the ultimate video game.
narrative_role: The young prodigy who sees violence as a game, until the stakes become real
media_archetype_inspiration: Ready Player One's Artemis / Live Die Repeat's Rita

concept_hook: A former French Foreign Legion commander turned mercenary who uses tactical superiority, heavy weapons, and psychological warfare to dominate larger male opponents.
narrative_role: The battlefield veteran who treats the ring like a war zone, commanding respect through competence
media_archetype_inspiration: Wonder Woman's General / The Bride in Kill Bill

concept_hook: A Colombian assassin who uses toxins, nerve strikes, and seduction to eliminate targets, finding genuine pleasure in the hunt but torturing herself over lost humanity.
narrative_role: The assassin who questions her profession but can't escape the adrenaline of the kill
media_archetype_inspiration: Atomic Blonde's Lorraine / Poison Ivy from Batman

concept_hook: A German alchemist who crafts potions and chemical weapons, fighting with explosive vials and corrosive brews while struggling with addiction to her own creations.
narrative_role: The brilliant chemist destroying herself slowly while perfecting her craft
media_archetype_inspiration: Fullmetal Alchemist's Izumi / Breaking Bad's Walter White (female)

concept_hook: A Greek museum exhibit brought to life through ancient magic, fighting with ethereal weapons and nature manipulation while mourning a civilization lost to time.
narrative_role: The ancient spirit adapting to modern combat, carrying centuries of melancholy
media_archetype_inspiration: Persona 5's Ann / Ghost of Tsushima's spirit

concept_hook: A cybernetically enhanced Australian test subject who escaped a government program, fighting with military-grade augmentations while questioning her own humanity.
narrative_role: The weapon who became more than her programming, fighting to prove she's more than a machine
media_archetype_inspiration: Terminator's Sarah Connor / Ghost in the Shell's Major

concept_hook: A possessed Victorian porcelain doll animated by a child's malicious spirit, fighting with eerie precision and laughing at pain while seeking the affection she was denied in life.
narrative_role: The disturbed spirit in a beautiful container, terrifyingly cheerful about violence

concept_hook: A Mexican exorcist wielding holy power and blessed weapons, fighting demons while secretly questioning her faith and enjoying the violence she justifies as holy work.
narrative_role: The holy warrior with a dark secret — she loves smiting evil, perhaps too much
